# Organo - Visual Organization Chart Editor

> Organo is a browser-based visual organization chart (organogram) editor built with React Flow. Users can create, edit, and export org charts using drag-and-drop.

## Key Features

- Drag-and-drop org chart creation with person nodes and org-unit nodes
- Real-time canvas editing with auto-layout (Dagre algorithm)
- Export to JSON tree (AWS Organizations compatible), flat CSV (Salesforce / Kaonavi compatible), standalone HTML, PNG, SVG, PDF
- Dark / light theme toggle
- Real-time search and node filtering
- Edge reconnection and quick-create menu on drag-to-empty-space

## Docs

- [Full technical documentation](https://organo.pages.dev/llms-full.txt)

## Tech Stack

- React 19, TypeScript, Vite
- React Flow (node-based canvas)
- Zustand (state management)
- Dagre (auto-layout)
- Framer Motion (animations)
- Zod (validation)
- html-to-image + jsPDF (image/PDF export)

## Data Model

### Node Types
- **person**: name, role, department, email, phone, employmentType, image, tags
- **org-unit**: unitName, unitType (company/headquarters/bureau/department/division/section/unit/post), headPersonName, memberCount, description, tags

### Export Formats
- **JSON Tree**: Recursive parent-children hierarchy. Multiple roots supported.
- **Flat CSV**: One row per node with computed Parent ID column. UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility.
- **Standalone HTML**: Single-file, zero-dependency HTML with CSS family-tree layout. Print-ready.
